creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Passenger requires bash, but doesn't specify that in RUN_DEPENDS and doesn't
specify a path, so the path defaults to "/usr/bin:/bin" per the exec(3) man
page. This works fine on systems where bash is in that path, but not for us.
This patch should fix that. This may not be the ideal way to solve it, but it
seems to work well in testing. Alternate patches welcome.

Port maintainer (osa@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
